evidence.label: Primary MACE
evidence.text: The primary outcome occurred in 379 (4.1%) in the rivaroxaban+aspirin group and 496 (5.4%) in the aspirin-alone group (HR 0.76; 95% CI, 0.66 to 0.86; P<0.001).

evidence.label: Primary Composite
evidence.text: The primary end point occurred in 508 (15.5%) rivaroxaban+aspirin vs 584 (17.8%) placebo+aspirin (HR 0.85; 95% CI, 0.76 to 0.96; P=0.009).

evidence.label: Primary MACE
evidence.text: The primary outcome occurred in 626 (25.0%) rivaroxaban vs 658 (26.2%) placebo patients (HR 0.94; 95% CI, 0.84 to 1.05; P=0.27).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 95 Years; healthy volunteers: f. allOutcomes.title: CV death, MI, or stroke (2.5 mg arm)

evidence.label: Primary MACE
evidence.text: In the 2.5 mg rivaroxaban arm, the primary end point occurred in 313 (9.1%) vs 376 (10.7%) placebo (HR 0.84; 95% CI, 0.72 to 0.97; P=0.02).
